description: Aggregate task counts grouped by status. Used for dashboard stat cards and pie charts.
purpose: Provides a breakdown of how many tasks are in each status (NEW, in_progress, DONE, archived) for overview dashboards.
fromSql: SELECT gp_task_status AS status, COUNT(*) AS count FROM mt_gp_task WHERE tenant_id = #{params.tenantId} GROUP BY gp_task_status ORDER BY CASE gp_task_status WHEN 'new' THEN 1 WHEN 'in_progress' THEN 2 WHEN 'done' THEN 3 WHEN 'archived' THEN 4 ELSE 5 END

description: Lists all tasks that are past their due date and not yet completed or archived. Used for alerts and follow-up dashboards.
purpose: Identifies tasks where due_date < today AND status is still NEW or in_progress, enabling proactive follow-up on overdue work items.
fromSql: SELECT pid, gp_task_code, gp_task_title, gp_task_status, gp_task_priority, gp_task_assignee, gp_task_due_date FROM mt_gp_task WHERE tenant_id = #{params.tenantId} AND gp_task_due_date < CURRENT_DATE AND gp_task_status IN ('new', 'in_progress') AND (#{params.assignee} IS NULL OR #{params.assignee} = '' OR gp_task_assignee = #{params.assignee}) ORDER BY gp_task_due_date ASC
